title: Minky Deluxe Ironing Board Cover, Ironing Board Covers 122 x 38 cm, Drawstring Ironing Board Cover, Extra Thick Felt Pad, 100% Cotton, Washing Machine Save, Made in the UK
features: EASY TO FIT - Measuring 122 x 38 cm, this Minky ironing board cover is specifically designed to fit all standard Minky boards perfectly, providing a flawless ironing surface every time.
STAYS IN PLACE - Designed with a unique nose pocket, that ensures a secure fit around your board and with its drawstring and toggle, you can easily tighten the cover, keeping it firmly in place.
EXTRA THICK & DURABLE - Made from 100% cotton and extra thick felt padding, resulting a wrinkle-free fabrics. Its machine washable design allows for effortless cleaning, saving you time and effort.
HIGH QUALITY - Its design eliminates unsightly creases, allowing you to achieve professional-looking results every time. This cover also protects your board from scratches and wear.

MADE IN THE UK – Crafted with precision and expertise, our products are both: quality & durability. Our rich heritage and experience in textile manufacture have made us the preferred choice since 1941
description: Product Description Minky Deluxe Ironing Board Cover Designed to fit perfectly on Minky Ironing Boards, this cover provides a high-performance ironing surface. Nose Pocket Boasting a unique nose pocket design, this cover offers a snug fit on your board, preventing any slippage or movement. Stylish Design Transform your ironing routine with this modern ironing board cover featuring trendy blue and turquoise stripes. Thick Felt Backing Crafted with a thick felt backing, it provides an ultra-smooth surface for effortless ironing. Easy to Clean Simply toss it in the washing machine for a quick and convenient clean. Made In The UK Expertly crafted with precise attention to detail, this cover embodies quality and durability. For over 80 years, our brand has been synonymous with excellence in textile manufacturing, making us the trusted choice since 1941. The cover's premium materials provide a smooth surface that allows your iron to effortlessly glide across fabrics, resulting in perfectly pressed clothes every time.
